name: makeDestructurable
description: Makes an object also iterable for array-style destructuring
examples: const result = makeDestructurable({ x: 10, y: 20 }, [10, 20] as const);

parameters.name: obj
parameters.description: - Object part of the returned value

source.source: * @param {object} obj - Object part of the returned value

tokens.name: obj
tokens.description: - Object part of the returned value

parameters.name: arr
parameters.description: - Iterable tuple/array part of the returned value

source.source: * @param {Array} arr - Iterable tuple/array part of the returned value

tokens.name: arr
tokens.description: - Iterable tuple/array part of the returned value

returns.name: Combined
returns.description: object that supports both object and array destructuring

source.source: * @returns {object & Array} Combined object that supports both object and array destructuring

tokens.description: object that supports both object and array destructuring
